text: Sɛla woo ti ya soke pu'uhegɔ puan nam, ya wan to'e.” Ba Soke Yezu Paŋa yele (Maki
translated: If you want to be saved, you must believe in the Lord Jesus Christ. In the name of the Lord Jesus (Maki).

ref: ‘Bethlehem in the land of Judea, you are very important among the towns of Judea. From your town will come a leader, who will be like a shepherd for my people Israel.’ ”
text: ‘Fum Bɛtelehɛm, n boi Yuda puan wa, kan dɛna timbila Yuda naduma nɛŋan; se'ere n sɔi la, fum puan ti naba wan yehe na; dɛna dunkiina bo' mam nɛreba Iziraleduma.’ ”
translated: Our Father, who is in heaven, may your will be done on earth as it is in heaven.

ref: This servant will then be punished and thrown out with the ones who only pretended to serve their master. There they will cry and grit their teeth in pain.
text: Daana wa wan wa'am na ŋma en zɔra zɔra, gee dikɛ en pa'ahɛ birekɔgenduma la puan ha. Zi'an ti kaahega la nyɛna ɔbega bɔna la.
translated: We went to the market and the people were bustling, but they were not pleased at home. If you wait, you will receive a good reward.

ref: Jesus said this because the people were saying that he had an evil spirit in him. Jesus' Mother and Brothers (Matthew
